Entry.EnglishText: Haa... I thought I was going to die.

Entry.JapaneseText: ……クロエとか言ったな。 お前バカだろ
Entry.EnglishText: I told you, didn't I, Chloe? You're such an idiot.

Entry.JapaneseText: な、ば、バカだと！？ 無礼な！！
なにが無礼だ！ 泳げないくせに、なんであんなボロ船で 川を渡ろうとした！？
Entry.EnglishText: What about it is rude?! You can't even swim, and yet you decided to try to cross the river in that run-down boat?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺が助けなきゃ死んでたんだぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: If I hadn't saved you, you'd be dead!

Entry.JapaneseText: し、仕方がないだろう。 ご老人が、向こう岸に渡りたいのに 橋がないと困っていたんだ
Entry.EnglishText: Th-There was nothing else I could do, you know? That elderly man was in a bind because there was no bridge, and he wanted to get to the other side.

Entry.JapaneseText: 無事、向こう岸に送り届けたはいいが まさか戻る途中で船が壊れるとは……
Entry.EnglishText: I was able to see him off safely on the other side, but I had no idea the boat would break like that on the way back...

Entry.JapaneseText: 本当に死ぬかと思った
Entry.EnglishText: I really thought I was about to die.

Entry.JapaneseText: む！？ なんだ？ あちらから助けを呼ぶ声がする！
Entry.EnglishText: Hm?! What's that? I hear someone calling out for help from over there!

Entry.JapaneseText: こうしてはいられない！ すまないが話はあとにしてくれ！
Entry.EnglishText: I can't just stay here! Sorry, but we'll have to talk about this later!

Entry.JapaneseText: おい、待て！ 話は最後まで聞け！！
Entry.EnglishText: Hey, wait! Listen to me until I'm done, dammit!!
